summary: Matt Fitzpatrick, CEO of Invisible Technologies, joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s Mandeep Singh on this episode of the Tech Disruptors podcast to discuss the use of reinforcement learning by frontier model providers for training, as well as the company’s enterprise business. They explore reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), agentic AI and self-improvement, the evolution of large language models, coding agents and contact centers.

summary: EasyJet Plc has rebuffed three separate offers from Castlelake LP, prompting the investment firm to take its proposal valuing the budget carrier at about £4.74 billion ($6.3 billion) directly to shareholders.

title: Oil Declines After US-Iran Deal Progress, Sanctions Waiver

summary: Oil declined on signs of progress in US-Iran peace talks including a waiver on some Iranian oil sanctions, bolstering hopes for a continued recovery in flows from the Persian Gulf.

title: Lesley Marks and Katerina Simonetti on US-Iran Talks, Market Outlook
title_cn: 莱斯利·马克斯和卡特琳娜·西蒙内蒂谈美伊谈判和市场前景
summary: Mackenzie Investments chief investment officer Lesley Marks and Morgan Stanley private wealth advisor and senior portfolio manager Katerina Simonetti discusses the US and Iran nuclear talks, their market outlook following the SpaceX IPO. They spoke with Guy Johnson on June 19, 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Abaxx Calls for Probe, Hires Paul Weiss After Short Seller’s Attack
title_cn: Abaxx 呼吁调查，在卖空者攻击后聘请保罗·韦斯 (Paul Weiss)
summary: Abaxx Technologies Inc. is asking Canadian market regulators to investigate whether manipulative trading occurred in its shares, and has hired law firm Paul Weiss for help in response to a short-selling campaign by Viceroy Research.

title: Diversify Outside of 'AI Only Play' Says Mamadou-Abou Sarr
title_cn: Mamadou-Abou Sarr 表示，要在“人工智能只玩游戏”之外实现多元化
summary:
Wall Street traders drove stocks down from the brink of all-time highs as a renewed slide in SpaceX overshadowed optimism about progress in peace talks between the US and Iran.
Mamadou-Abou Sarr, President & Co-Founder of V-Square Quantitative Management discusses the markets and how he is encouraging diversified investing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Advances After Negotiators Flag Headway in US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 谈判代表表示美伊谈判取得进展，金价上涨
summary: Gold rose as US and Iran negotiations made headway after a rocky start, with the two sides attempting to reach a peace deal within two months and formally end a war that’s roiled the global markets.

title: AbbVie's Deal with Apogee; Regenxbio Moves on Gene Therapy Drug | Stock Movers
title_cn: 艾伯维 (AbbVie) 与 Apogee 的交易； Regenxbio 继续开发基因治疗药物 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Nathan Hager:

- Apogee (APGE) shares are soaring on news AbbVie is closing in on a nearly $11 billion deal to buy inflammatory disease drug developer Apogee Therapeutics. That's also according to a Financial Times report.

- Regenxbio (RGNX) shares are moving on news Regenxbio aligned with the FDA on next steps for a potential accelerated approval of Navsunli, a gene therapy for Mucopolysaccharidosis II, with the FDA confirming the company doesn’t need to conduct additional studies of the drug.

- SpaceX (SPCX) is lower this morning, continuing its slide after its record IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alamos Gold Rejects Buyout Speculation
title_cn: 阿拉莫斯黄金公司否认收购猜测
summary: Alamos Gold CEO John McCluskey joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain the seismic disruption behind the company’s production cut, why he sees the setback as temporary, and why he rejects the idea that a weaker share price makes Alamos an M&A target. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Heat Wave Lowers Rhine Levels, Straining Fuel Supply Chains
title_cn: 热浪降低了莱茵河水位，给燃料供应链带来压力
summary: Falling Rhine water levels are choking fuel shipments to parts of western Europe as a heat wave grips the region, forcing barges to sail with less than half their normal loads.

title: The Price of Everything is Skyrocketing — Including Ice Cream
title_cn: 所有东西的价格都在飞涨——包括冰淇淋
summary:
This week, the Everybody's Business podcast hits the streets to ask New Yorkers how much they're paying for an ice cream cone.

Bloomberg's David Papadopoulos joins Stacey Vanek Smith and Max Chafkin to discuss how more and more things are out of reach for many Americans as inflation continues to outpace wages. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sprake: SARB Likely to Hike Before Year-End
title_cn: Sprake：南非央行可能在年底前加息
summary: Traders are paring back their bets on further interest-rate hikes by the South African Reserve Bank after inflation came in lower than expected. But Casey Sprake, Market Strategist at AG Capital told Bloomberg’s Chief Africa Correspondent Jennifer Zabasajja, they are expecting another rate hike before the end of the year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: President Trump 'Burned Out' From Iran Conflict: Newman
title_cn: 纽曼：特朗普总统因伊朗冲突而“精疲力竭”
summary: Kings College London visiting research fellow Lindsay Newman discusses US, Iran nuclear talks. She speaks with Francine Lacqua on June 19, 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bond Traders Plot Impact of Next UK Chancellor With Starmer Out
title_cn: 债券交易员们盘算斯塔默下台后英国下一任财政大臣的影响
summary: Investors are already speculating about who could be the next UK chancellor and what it will mean for the bond market.

title: Brazil Moves to Calm Markets After ‘Confusing’ Rate Decision
title_cn: 巴西在“令人困惑”的利率决定后转向平静的市场
summary: Brazil is stepping up efforts to ease investor concerns after a confusing central bank decision, with the Treasury canceling a scheduled domestic bond auction and the monetary authority moving to inject liquidity into the spot currency market as local rates sell off.

title: Vance Hails ‘Good Day’ of Iran Talks as US Waives Oil Sanctions
title_cn: 美国放弃石油制裁，万斯赞扬伊朗会谈“美好的一天”
summary: US Vice President JD Vance said talks with Iran over the weekend were “very, very good,” as the sides attempt to reach a peace deal within two months and formally end a war that’s reverberated through the global economy.

title: Lagarde Sees No Need for More Forceful ECB Response to War
title_cn: 拉加德认为欧洲央行无需对战争做出更强有力的反应
summary: The European Central Bank doesn’t need to react more forcefully to the fallout from the Middle East conflict because inflation is set to return to target over the medium term, President Christine Lagarde said.

title: Father’s Day Special Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
title_cn: 父亲节特别节目亚历克斯·罗德里格斯和杰森·凯利
summary:
Here on The Deal we have interviewed  some of the world’s most famous athletes and some of the most powerful people in sports. But today we welcome our most important guests and probably our hosts’ biggest critics: their children.

In this special Father’s Day episode of The Deal, Alex and Jason’s kids join us to share some perspective on who their dads are off the air. First up, Natasha and Ella Rodriguez give us the inside scoop on Alex’s past as a musical theatre star and which TikTok trends he struggled with the most. They also offer him some style advice and share their favorite family memories. Next, we hear from Jason’s sons, Henry and Will, about their dad’s level of Knicks fandom, who is the Josh Hart of the Kelly family and what he taught them about appreciating sports. Our closer is Alice Kelly, who asks Alex Rodriguez one of the most pressing questions of his career… does he like Pokémon? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AbbVie to Buy Apogee Therapeutics for $10.9 Billion
title_cn: 艾伯维 (AbbVie) 将以 109 亿美元收购 Apogee Therapeutics
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Sam Fazeli discusses AbbVie's $10.9 billion acquisition of Apogee Therapeutics. The deal enhances AbbVie's presence in dermatology by adding treatments for atopic dermatitis, commonly known as eczema, to its portfolio. He speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Targets US Rare Earths Firms in Response to Pentagon
title_cn: 中国针对美国稀土公司作为对五角大楼的回应
summary: China has imposed export controls against two US rare earth producers that are part of Washington’s effort to reduce its dependence on Beijing by establishing an alternative supply chain for the critical minerals.

title: High AI Spending is 'Not Temporary' Says Everpure CFO Robbiati
title_cn: Everpure 首席财务官 Robbiati 表示，人工智能的高支出“不是暂时的”
summary: Tarek Robbiati, CFO of data storage company Everpure, said that the increased capex spend on AI is 'not temporary' even if the industry supply and demand equation rebalances and more AI capacity becomes available. Robbiati said that while the AI market is expected to revert to a mean, it will not happen quickly and it may not go back to the same level.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Colombia Assets Rise as Market Favorite Espriella Wins Vote
title_cn: 哥伦比亚资产上涨，市场最爱埃斯普里埃拉赢得投票
summary: Colombian assets rose after Abelardo de la Espriella won one of the tightest presidential elections in the nation’s history, setting the stage for a swing to market-friendly policies that have sparked rallies across Latin America.

title: Qatar Says Explosion at Ras Laffan Site Won’t Affect LNG Exports
title_cn: 卡塔尔称拉斯拉凡基地爆炸不会影响液化天然气出口
summary: Qatar said it doesn’t expect liquefied natural gas exports to be impacted by an explosion at the Ras Laffan industrial complex which left 13 dead and 66 injured.

title: JPMorgan's Sundar Discusses AI Investment Opportunities
title_cn: 摩根大通的桑达尔讨论人工智能投资机会
summary: Sitara Sundar, JPMorgan Private Bank Head of Alternative Investment Strategy, provided insights on the recent explosive growth in memory chip stocks, highlighting companies like Micron which have seen gains of up to 1,000% over the past year. She discussed the current bottlenecks in chip supply and explored potential next steps for investors seeking opportunities in the AI sector beyond the chip market. The segment also noted the broader market context with fluctuating stock prices influenced by geopolitical developments between the US and Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Groq Raises $650 Million to Aid in Pivot After Nvidia Deal
title_cn: 与 Nvidia 达成交易后，Groq 筹集 6.5 亿美元以协助 Pivot
summary: Groq Inc. raised $650 million in a new funding round aimed at expanding its data center capacity and helping the one-time chip startup become a provider of artificial intelligence computing.

title: How Eli Lilly Became a $1 Trillion Company
title_cn: 礼来公司 (Eli Lilly) 如何成为价值 1 万亿美元的公司
summary: Mounjaro and Zepbound turned Eli Lilly into a trillion-dollar pharmaceutical giant. But every blockbuster eventually faces competition– here's what Lilly is doing to avoid the boom-and-bust cycle that has humbled pharma giants in the past. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How AI Is Reshaping Retail Discounts
title_cn: 人工智能如何重塑零售折扣
summary: Upside Co-Founder and CEO Alex Kinnier joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why American consumers are feeling squeezed despite falling gas prices, reveals what transaction data says about spending habits. He also discusses how AI is transforming retail with hyper-personalized offers that save consumers money while helping retailers grow profits. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kazakh $1 Billion Fund Backs Startups as Region Lures Investment
title_cn: 哈萨克斯坦地区吸引投资，10亿美元基金支持初创企业
summary: Kazakhstan’s Alem Capital Management anchored a regional venture capital fund backing technology startups across Central Asia and the Caucasus.

title: SpaceX Inks Multibillion-Dollar Computing Deal With Reflection AI
title_cn: SpaceX 与 Reflection AI 签署价值数十亿美元的计算协议
summary: SpaceX has inked a multibillion-dollar agreement to provide computing resources to artificial intelligence startup Reflection AI, the latest in a string deals from Elon Musk’s firm as it vies to become an AI infrastructure provider.

title: How Anthropic Weighs the Risk of Human Extinction
title_cn: 人类如何权衡人类灭绝的风险
summary:
There’s a lot to unpack with AI right now, including its potential impacts on the labor market and society and more extreme questions about existential risk.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Anthropic’s Jack Clark (co-founder and head of public benefit) and Peter McCrory (head of economics) join Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss how the company views the possibility of AI killing all humans and its approach to safety and economic risks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Declines for a Third Day After Announcing Bond Sale
title_cn: SpaceX 宣布债券发售后股价连续第三天下跌
summary: SpaceX shares slipped for a third straight day after the Elon Musk-led company said it is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time, part of what’s expected to be a massive borrowing spree to fund its artificial-intelligence ambitions.

title: Two Plead Guilty to Hacking Transport for London While Teenagers
title_cn: 两名青少年承认对伦敦交通进行黑客攻击
summary: Two British men pleaded guilty to carrying out a cyber attack on London’s transport network while still teenagers.

title: Using AI to Develop New Drugs
title_cn: 利用人工智能开发新药
summary: Shawn Rosemarin, Global VP of Research & Development, Customer Engineering, Everpure and Pradeep Bandaru, Head of Platforms & AI Workflows at Sanofi join Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec to discuss the way better data can help the pharmaceutical industry develop new drugs.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Kicks Off Debut High-Grade Bond Sale
title_cn: SpaceX 启动首次高等级债券发售
summary: SpaceX is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time to fund the company's AI ambitions following its record IPO. Ed Ludlow has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Bankers Kick Off Marketing for Debut High-Grade Bond Sale
title_cn: SpaceX 银行家启动首次高等级债券销售营销
summary: SpaceX is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time in what’s expected to be the start of a massive borrowing spree to fund the company’s AI ambitions following its record $75 billion IPO.

title: Nvidia Seeks to Make Humanoid AI Robots Safer Around Humans
title_cn: Nvidia 寻求让人形人工智能机器人在人类周围更安全
summary: Nvidia Corp. is working to make humanoid robots safer around people, arguing that they’ll need to handle split-second decisions before they can be trusted to work closely with humans.

title: Meta Taps New WhatsApp Boss as Part of $900 Million Investment
title_cn: Meta 任命 WhatsApp 新任老板作为 9 亿美元投资的一部分
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is investing $900 million into Indian fintech startup Cred, with plans to appoint its founder, Kunal Shah, the new leader of WhatsApp.

title: Microsoft and Chevron Sign 20-Year Power Deal For Texas Data Center
title_cn: 微软和雪佛龙签署德克萨斯数据中心 20 年电力协议
summary: Chevron Corp. signed a 20-year deal with Microsoft Corp. to provide natural-gas fired power for a proposed West Texas data center, which could be one of the biggest in the US.

title: Robinhood Seeks to Raise $2 Billion in Convertible Bond Sale
title_cn: Robinhood 寻求通过可转换债券发行筹集 20 亿美元
summary: Robinhood Markets Inc. is seeking to raise $2 billion in a convertible bond offering as it joins a roaring market for pooling cash.

title: Amazon Prime Day Spending Expected to Rise 9% to $26.3 Billion
title_cn: 亚马逊 Prime Day 支出预计增长 9% 至 263 亿美元
summary: Shoppers feeling the sting of higher gas prices are expected to snatch up deals on back-to-school clothes and household goods, pushing online spending to another record during Amazon.com Inc.’s 12th annual Prime Day sale that begins Tuesday.

title: Amazon Prime Day Pizza Promotion Offers Clue to Meal-Delivery Task
title_cn: 亚马逊 Prime Day 披萨促销提供送餐任务线索
summary: Online retailer hasn’t had success in the competitive dinner-delivery market

title: AI Could Boost Poland’s Economy by 12% by 2035, World Bank Says
title_cn: 世界银行表示，到 2035 年，人工智能将使波兰经济增长 12%
summary: Artificial Intelligence could boost Poland’s economy by as much as 12% by 2035 and help it converge with the world’s richest countries even as local cost advantages fade, the World Bank said.

title: China Makes Sweeping Education Reforms to Prepare for AI Era
title_cn: 中国进行全面教育改革，为人工智能时代做好准备
summary: Beijing has eliminated over 12,000 university degree programs, dismissing many as relics of a bygone era

title: Getty Images Soars 200% in Early Trading After OpenAI Deal
title_cn: OpenAI 交易后早期交易飙升 200%
summary: Shares of Getty Images Holdings Inc. jumped about 200% in premarket trading on Monday after the photography repository announced a licensing deal with OpenAI.

title: Korea Markets Chief Regrets Allowing Single-Stock Leveraged ETFs
title_cn: 韩国市场负责人对允许单一股票杠杆 ETF 感到遗憾
summary: South Korea’s top financial regulator said he regrets not blocking the launch of leveraged exchange-traded funds tracking single stocks last month, warning their negative side effects have grown significantly.

title: Chinese Backing Helps African Startup Spiro Near Unicorn Status
title_cn: 中国的支持帮助非洲初创公司 Spiro 接近独角兽地位
summary: Chinese investor NewTrails Capital will invest $55 million into African electric mobility startup Spiro, helping boost the company’s valuation.

title: Tencent Tests AI Assistant for Its Super App WeChat in China
title_cn: 腾讯在中国测试其超级应用微信的人工智能助手
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. has started testing a new AI assistant for WeChat as part of its efforts to catch up with peers in China’s white-hot artificial intelligence race.

title: South Korea’s Policy Chief Flags Property Risks From Chip Windfall
title_cn: 韩国政策负责人指出芯片意外之财带来的财产风险
summary: South Korea’s presidential policy chief said policymakers need to consider how gains from the country’s chip-led boom will spread through the broader economy, warning that excess liquidity has historically found its way into the property market.

title: アップル変革のカギはデザイン復権、大ヒット左右する次期CEOの最優先課題－Power On
title_cn: 苹果转型关键在于恢复设计，下一届CEO的重中之重将决定能否大爆 - Power On
summary: かつて世界を魅了したアップルのデザイン。次期CEOに託されたのは岐路に立つデザイン部門の再建だ。

title: Hong Kong Seeks IPO Access for Chinese Investors, Higher Quotas
title_cn: 香港寻求中国投资者IPO准入及更高配额
summary: Hong Kong is in talks with Chinese authorities to expand cross-border investment channels and grant mainland buyers access to local initial public offerings, following a regulatory crackdown on illicit offshore capital flows, according to Financial Secretary Paul Chan.

title: Taiwanese Brothers Amass $1 Billion From Boom in Display Chips
title_cn: 台湾兄弟凭借显示芯片的繁荣积累了 10 亿美元
summary: Biing-seng Wu has spent most of his career developing tiny chips that tell pixels on flat-screen displays how and when to light up.

title: How Will Wall Street Remember Alan Greenspan?
title_cn: 华尔街将如何记住艾伦·格林斯潘？
summary: Alan Greenspan has died at the age of 100. Greenspan’s 18 years as Fed chief, from 1987 until his retirement at the start of 2006, were marked by a stock market boom and low unemployment. Bloomberg's Michael McKee reports on how Wall Street may see Greenspan's legacy.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Ally Wins Colombia Election, Heralding Pro-Market Turn
title_cn: 特朗普盟友赢得哥伦比亚大选，预示着亲市场的转变
summary: Colombia had its presidential election over the weekend and while the confirmed results are still to come, preliminary results show conservative lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella was in the lead, heralding a swing back to business-friendly and pro-US policies after four years of leftist rule. Malu Poveda explains  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Had 'Very Good Day' Speaking With Iran, Vance Says
title_cn: 万斯表示，美国与伊朗的对话“非常愉快”
summary: US Vice President JD Vance said talks with Iran over the weekend were “very, very good,” as the sides attempt to reach a peace deal within two months and formally end a war. Vance says a key point was building a mechanism to keep the Strait of Hormuz open. He spoke to reporters in Emmen, Switzerland where talks are being held. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Romanian Premier Nominee Courts Far Right in Confidence Vote Bid
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总理候选人向极右翼寻求信任投票
summary: Romania’s prime minister-designate turned to far-right lawmakers for support as he tries to build a majority ahead of a confidence vote in a deeply divided parliament.

title: Why the Israel-Hezbollah Fight Complicates Resolving the Iran War
title_cn: 为什么以色列与真主党的斗争使伊朗战争的解决变得复杂
summary: After the US and Israel began their war with Iran on Feb. 28, the Iran-backed Lebanese militia Hezbollah was quick to join the fray, firing rockets and drones into Israel. Officials there saw in the crisis sweeping the region a chance to finally drive Hezbollah, already weakened by a series of setbacks, away from Israel’s northern border.

title: The People Around Andy Burnham Who Could Shape UK Politics
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆周围能够塑造英国政治的人
summary: Andy Burnham looks likely to become the UK’s next prime minister after Keir Starmer announced his resignation and potential rivals endorsed Parliament’s newest MP to succeed him.

title: Burnham Poised for Power in UK After Starmer Steps Aside
title_cn: 斯塔默退位后，伯纳姆准备在英国掌权
summary: Andy Burnham appears set to become the UK’s seventh prime minister in a decade after Keir Starmer laid out a timeline for his own departure and potential rivals backed a quick transition to the popular Manchester politician.

title: US Waives Iran Oil Sanctions as Peace Deal Brings Huge Shift
title_cn: 和平协议带来巨大转变，美国放弃对伊朗石油制裁
summary: The US has authorized the sale of Iranian oil and fuels as part of an agreement to end the war against Tehran, a sweeping change after years of punitive economic sanctions.

title: EU Trade Chief to Talk Imbalances With Chinese Counterpart
title_cn: 欧盟贸易负责人将与中国同行讨论失衡问题
summary: The European Union’s trade chief will meet with his Chinese counterpart next Monday as the bloc pushes Beijing to address a widening trade imbalance with one of its largest economic partners.

title: Muddy Waters CEO Carson Block on AI, Jobs, and the Next Market Crisis
title_cn: 浑水公司首席执行官卡森·布洛克谈人工智能、就业和下一次市场危机
summary: Carson Block warns investors may be underestimating the economic consequences of artificial intelligence. The Muddy Waters Capital founder and chief executive joins Merryn Somerset Webb to explain why recent advances in AI have made him rethink its impact on the labor market — and why he believes widespread displacement of knowledge workers could eventually create a major challenge for financial markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amundi Investment Head on UK Politics and Fed Outlook
title_cn: Amundi 英国政治和美联储展望投资主管
summary: Monica Defend, Amundi Investment Institute Head, joined the discussion to provide insights on recent developments affecting financial markets. The Federal Reserve's evolving monetary policy outlook in the United States, which remains a key driver for investors. Additionally, Defend was asked about the implications of the resignation of a UK political figure beyond the transition period, specifically regarding investment strategies related to Britain. The segment highlighted ongoing market attention to UK political changes, including plans for a new UK Prime Minister by September, as well as the impact of these events on UK government bond yields and broader market sentiment. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Can Burnham Succeed After Starmer?
title_cn: 伯纳姆能否在斯塔默之后取得成功？
summary: Britain is set to get its seventh prime minister in a decade. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Rosa Prince says Andy Burnham has a rare opportunity to succeed where others have failed. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. McCormick on Iran War, Fed, Alan Greenspan
title_cn: 参议员麦考密克谈伊朗战争、美联储、艾伦·格林斯潘
summary: Republican Senator Dave McCormick of Pennsylvania joins "Bloomberg Surveillance" to discuss the current state of negotiations with Iran, the death of Alan Greenspan and how the Federal Reserve will operate under its new Chairman Kevin Warsh. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham Sworn in as MP for Makerfield
title_cn: 伯纳姆宣誓就任梅克菲尔德议员
summary: Andy Burnham has been sworn in as member of parliament for Makerfield. Labour Party MPs greeted his name with a cheer when it was announced. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-DUP Leader MP Donaldson Found Guilty of Rape and Assault by UK Jury
title_cn: 英国陪审团裁定前民主统一党领袖议员唐纳森犯有强奸和袭击罪
summary: Jeffrey Donaldson, who was one of Northern Ireland’s most important political figures, was found guilty of raping a minor.

title: Starmer Resigns as UK Prime Minister, Paving Way for Burnham
title_cn: 斯塔默辞去英国首相职务，为伯纳姆铺平道路
summary:
Keir Starmer's resignation as UK prime minister has paved the way for Andy Burnham to secure the keys to 10 Downing Street.

Lizzy Burden explains what comes next, and how markets are reacting. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Czech Row Over NATO Summit Team to Escalate as President Banned
title_cn: 捷克对北约峰会小组的争议升级，总统被禁止
summary: Czech Prime Minister Andrej Babis said the president won’t be part of a NATO summit team, escalating a spat that’s already divided the nation’s top leadership for months.

title: Vance Says 'Good Progress' Made in Talks With Iran
title_cn: 万斯表示与伊朗的谈判取得“良好进展”
summary: US Vice President JD Vance says a good foundation has been laid to end the war with Iran, but more work needs to be done. He spoke to reporters in Switzerland on Monday morning. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kenya Court to Sentence Health Secretary for Defying Ebola Order
title_cn: 肯尼亚法院因卫生部长违反埃博拉命令而判处其刑罚
summary: A Kenyan high court will sentence the nation’s health secretary for contempt after ruling that he ignored an order halting construction of an Ebola quarantine facility for US nationals in the East African nation.

title: The Economy Does Not Depend on Fed Policy, Roubini Says
title_cn: 鲁比尼表示，经济并不依赖于美联储政策
summary: Nouriel Roubini, Roubini Macro Associates chairman and Hudson Bay Capital senior economic strategist, says he expects US inflation to slow down and the economy is being powered by the tech boom and not Federal Reserve policy. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Deploys Police as Anti-Migrant Deadline Looms
title_cn: 南非部署警察应对反移民最后期限
summary: South Africa will deploy more police this week to deter possible violence before a June 30 deadline set by xenophobic protest groups for foreigners to leave the country.

title: Hungary Unveils Plan to Oust President, Orban’s Allies
title_cn: 匈牙利公布推翻总统和欧尔班盟友的计划
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar presented sweeping plans to remove the country’s president and other senior state officials, delivering on his promise to make a clean break after 16 years of increasingly authoritarian rule under Viktor Orban.

title: De la Espriella, aliado de Trump, gana elecciones en Colombia
title_cn: 特朗普盟友德拉埃斯普里埃拉赢得哥伦比亚选举
summary: Colombia eligió como presidente al abogado conservador Abelardo de la Espriella, marcando un giro hacia políticas favorables a las empresas y a EE.UU. tras cuatro años de gobierno de izquierda. Su ajustada victoria en el recuento preliminar sobre Iván Cepeda fue impugnada por el presidente Gustavo Petro, reflejando la profunda polarización del país. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Fed Chairman Alan Greenspan Dies at 100
title_cn: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
summary: Alan Greenspan has died at the age of 100. He served as Fed chief for 18 years, from 1987 to 2006, and was credited with guiding a record US economic expansion, but his legacy was later dimmed by the financial crisis that erupted in 2008. Greenspan died on June 22 at his home due to complications of Parkinson's disease. Bloomberg's David Westin looks back at his accomplishments.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Quits, Sets Out Plan for New UK PM by September
title_cn: 斯塔默辞职，制定九月前新任英国首相的计划
summary:
Keir Starmer said he would step down as Britain’s prime minister after suffering a precipitous fall from favor, paving the way for Andy Burnham to succeed him. On Monday, Burnham, the former mayor of Manchester, said on X that he would “put himself forward.”

Starmer announced on Monday morning that he would step down first as Labour leader, with nominations for a successor opening July 9 and any contest wrapped up by the end of Parliament’s summer break on Sept. 1. He said he would remain in office until the process is done, and “ensure an orderly handover of power.” 

For more, we speak with John Micklethwait, Editor-in-Chief for Bloomberg News. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump, Senate GOP Are Increasingly at Odds as Election Nears
title_cn: 随着选举临近，特朗普与参议院共和党的分歧越来越大
summary: The uneasy relationship carries major potential election impacts

title: Starmer Resigns as UK Prime Minister, Paving Way For Burnham
title_cn: 斯塔默辞去英国首相职务，为伯纳姆铺平道路
summary:
Keir Starmer announced his resignation as UK prime minister, paving the way for Andy Burnham to take over the top job.

The long-time mayor of Manchester, who won a parliamentary seat last week, announced a leadership bid minutes later — while his main rival, Wes Streeting, bowed out of the race. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Quits and Sets Out Plan for New UK PM by September
title_cn: 斯塔默辞职并制定九月前新任英国首相的计划
summary: Keir Starmer said he would step down as Britain’s prime minister after suffering a precipitous fall from favor, paving the way for Andy Burnham to succeed him.

title: Markets Expected Starmer's Resignation as UK PM: Amundi
title_cn: 市场预计斯塔默将辞去英国首相职务：Amundi
summary: Amundi Investment Institute Head Monica Defend discusses the market reaction to Keir Starmer's announcement that he will step down as British prime minister. Speaking on Bloomberg Television, she says "this was largely expected," which justifies the "containment in volatility." Defend adds there is still value on the yield and that "the real story is one of fiscal discipline." (Source: Bloomberg)
